performed_via_github_app.name: decomp.dev
performed_via_github_app.description:
This GitHub app allows decomp.dev to receive notifications when a GitHub Actions workflow completes, rather than polling every 30 minutes.

Additionally, decomp.dev will automatically comment on PRs detailing any changes. PR comments may be configured in the [management interface](https://decomp.dev/manage).

body: Leaving it here for someone who has more patience with permuter than me :)
